---
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, custom.scss]
    aspectratio: 16x9
    slide-number: true
    css: custom.css
    embed-resources: true
editor: source
execute:
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
---

```{r}
"#FDDC5C"
```

::: {.r-stack background-color="#FDDC5C"}

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="30%"}
<br> 
![](images/logo.png)
:::

::: {.column width="70%"}
<br>

## West by Midwest: Package Maintenance, Transition and Handover 

<br> <br> 
#### *Julia Piaskowski*

*Director of Statistical Programs, University of Idaho*

#### *Russ Lenth**

*Professor Emeritus of Statistics, University of Iowa* 

<br>

*May 14, 2026* 
<br> <br> 

:::

::::
:::

```{r}
library(emmeans)

warp.lm <- lm(breaks ~ wool * tension, data = warpbreaks)
warp.emm <- emmeans(warp.lm, ~ tension | wool, at = list(wool = "A"))
plot(warp.emm, PIs = TRUE, comparisons = TRUE)


# pigs.lm <- lm(log(conc + 2) ~ source * factor(percent), data = pigs)
# pigs.emm <- emmeans(pigs.lm, ~ percent | source, at = list(source = "fish"))
# plot(pigs.emm, type = "scale", breaks = seq(20, 100, by = 10), 
#      facetlab = "label_value", comparisons = TRUE)

ggsave("images/logo_start.png", width = 3, height = 2.5)
```
